questions.question: Explain the main differences between Agile and Traditional project management methodologies, highlighting at least two key characteristics of each approach. (Assumes basic understanding of project management concepts) (15 marks)

Describe the concept of 'Scope Creep' and its impact on project management, including the steps that can be taken to mitigate this issue. (Assumes basic understanding of project management concepts) (15 marks)

What is the purpose of a 'Work Breakdown Structure' (WBS) in project management, and how can it be used to facilitate effective project planning and control? Provide an example of a WBS in a simple project context. (Assumes basic understanding of project management concepts) (10 marks)
